source_pr.title: *: migrate dependency management to Go1.11 module
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/7922

### What is changed and how it works?

* `go mod init`
* remove `vendor` directory
* rename import path "github.com/pkg/errors" to "github.com/pingcap/errors"
* tiny update `util/logutil` to fix CI


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - No code

Side effects

- Don't forget to update other repos

@disksing @lysu

symptoms: - // a small race window with the HTTP/1 Transport's integration
failure_signature: - // a small race window with the HTTP/1 Transport's integration
fix_pattern: *: migrate dependency management to Go1.11 module

evidence: evidence: - // a small race window with the HTTP/1 Transport's integration
